hero.title: Artha Mitra Interdata
hero.description: Established in 2003, Artha Mitra Interdata (AMI) is a leading IT Solutions Integrator and Provider in Indonesia. We partner with businesses to manage IT infrastructure and security by optimizing efficiency, enabling organizations to focus on their core objectives.

highlights.text: Our experience in the IT integrations industry has allowed us to work with different clients across various industries — from banking and finance to government and manufacturing — each with unique challenges that have shaped the way we deliver our solutions.

We specialize in IT Infrastructure and Security solutions, covering network hardware, software, bandwidth management, firewall systems, anti-spam solutions, VoIP, and comprehensive security audits to protect your business-critical assets.

With partnerships spanning global technology leaders like Juniper Networks, Barracuda, Rapid7, A10 Networks, and more, we bring world-class solutions tailored to the Indonesian market and your specific business requirements.

vision: Be the company of choice as a technology solution integrator and provider to intensify customers' competitive edge.
mission: Cooperate with customers as a partner by assisting them to achieve their competitive business objectives through leadership and professionalism of services, as well as delivering excellent performance with dedicated and motivated people.

history.title: History & Journey
history.description:
Artha Mitra Interdata (AMI) was established in 2003. Our experience in the IT integrations industry has since allowed us to work with different clients across various industries, each with different experiences that have shaped the way we deliver our solutions.

We look to continue building upon the decade-long body of knowledge that we've had, and continuously providing value for the clients that we work with by applying and adopting suitable technology.

milestones.description: Company Founded — AMI established as IT Solutions Integrator in Jakarta
Partnership Expansion — Became authorized partner for major global IT brands
Security Focus — Expanded cybersecurity solutions portfolio with Rapid7 & Barracuda
Continued Growth — Serving clients across banking, government, and enterprise sectors

lifeAtAmi.title: Life at AMI
lifeAtAmi.subtitle: Artha Mitra Interdata
lifeAtAmi.description: At Artha Mitra Interdata, we foster a culture of collaboration, continuous learning, and professional growth. Our team is driven by a shared passion for technology and the commitment to deliver exceptional results for our clients. We believe that great partnerships start with great people.

positions.title: JavaScript Developer (NodeJS)
positions.summary: Build and maintain backend services, APIs, and internal integrations for enterprise platforms.

positions.title: IT Service Desk Manager
positions.summary: Lead service desk operations, manage SLA performance, and improve end-user support quality.

positions.title: Network Engineer
positions.summary: Design, deploy, and troubleshoot enterprise network infrastructure and security controls.

positions.title: Backend Engineer (Python)
positions.summary: Develop scalable backend modules, automate workflows, and optimize system reliability.

positions.title: Frontend Engineer (React)
positions.summary: Create responsive web interfaces and collaborate closely with UX and backend teams.

positions.title: Cyber Security Analyst
positions.summary: Monitor security events, perform incident response, and implement preventive controls.

positions.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
positions.summary: Manage cloud architecture, CI/CD infrastructure, and platform observability practices.

positions.title: QA Automation Engineer
positions.summary: Build automated test pipelines and enforce quality standards across product releases.

positions.title: Technical Account Manager
positions.summary: Bridge technical delivery and client communication to ensure project success and retention.

cvForm.title: Send Us Your CV
cvForm.description: Artha Mitra Interdata is always looking for bright and like-minded individuals to join our team. New talents are always welcomed as Artha Mitra Interdata looks to continue its business growth and serve clients in the IT solution integration sector.
cvForm.note: Your application will be kept in storage for a period and we will get in touch with you as soon as we find a match. Please attach your CV in PDF/DOC/JPEG format (maximum size of 2MB).
